entity.summary: Chiliz Chain decentralized exchange for token swaps and liquidity provision, represented by current first-party interface code and DEX registry data.
entity.notes: First-party interface code identifies DiviSwap as a Chiliz Chain DEX for token trading and liquidity provision and declares diviswap.io as the canonical site. The source candidate is also preserved in current DefiLlama discovery data. The public site was not independently fetched in this review, so the URL remains live_unverified and confidence is medium.

evidence.title: DiviSwap first-party interface metadata
evidence.notes: First-party interface metadata identifies DiviSwap as a Chiliz Chain decentralized exchange for token trading and liquidity provision and declares https://diviswap.io as the canonical site.

evidence.title: DiviSwap DEX registry entry
evidence.notes: Current protocol registry preserves DiviSwap as a decentralized exchange identity. First-party interface evidence remains the primary entity source.
